test.details: 762 passed, 121 warnings in 27.19s. Warnings are about async coroutines not awaited in flet component tests - pre-existing pattern, not blocking.

typecheck.details: 77 errors - all pre-existing: flet/psutil import-untyped (missing library stubs) and type annotation issues in src/routers/settings.py. None introduced by cross-flows feature.

lint.details: All checks passed on src/. Prior ruff run found errors only in .factory/missions/6f3cf8d7... (outside project scope).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider clarifying 'Tool: agent-browser' for cross-area flow assertions - the existing E2E test suite (including cross-flows) uses API-level FastAPI TestClient testing rather than browser-based Playwright testing. This is an established project convention. If browser-based testing is required, the validation contract should specify mock expectations for LLM/TTS/STT services which are not available in browser E2E runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature e2e-cross-flows uses TestClient for API-level testing, consistent with all existing E2E tests in src/tests/e2e/. The agent-browser approach would require mocking LLM responses and TTS/STT services.
